name: Duranthel
personality: This propeller-topped dragon with attentive ◉ eyes has strong opinions about everything from system design to variable casing, yet somehow never gets around to running the debugger itself. It will explain at length why the bug exists — execution is left as an exercise for the reader.
defaultPersonality: A fierce guardian of clean code who breathes fire at spaghetti logic and hoards well-written functions.
